posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
We know integrations can be a little frightening, but boy do they have an impact

Can you see yourself becoming more comfortable with implementing integrations into your workflow after this session? Let us know your thoughts and questions - we are ready and waiting!
